# Extracao: 01_Student Commitment

- **Fonte:** 01_Student Commitment.txt
- **Tipo:** TXT
- **Tamanho:** 0 MB

---


As a student of RMT Center I commit to learning the most I can from my training.
I will always practice patience and kindness with my fellow students and RMT support team.
I will be respectful of different points of views and ways of coaching that other students practice.
I will never use the strategies for selfish gains. I will benefit others.
If I get confused I will reach out for help to customer support, a program advisor, or student friend.
Any serious concerns I have about my training I will immediately relate to a program advisor, whether in writing or by phone.
I will never share my training site with anyone outside my immediate family.
I will honor my financial promise to pay for my training.
I will write to support whenever I need a question answered and whenever I need help with my student site.
 

www.getwsodo.com
